title: Pinterest shares surge 20% after Q4 2024 earnings beat, record user count
text: Pinterest shares surged as much as 20% after the social media company reported fourth-quarter earnings that beat on revenue. This earnings report came in February 2025 for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2024. Revenue came to $1.15 billion vs. $1.14 billion expected, and fourth-quarter adjusted EBITDA was $470.9 million adjusted vs. $444.8 million expected. Revenue for Pinterest's fourth quarter jumped 18% year over year, and the company's fourth-quarter adjusted EBITDA margin was 41%, which was higher than the 39% Wall Street was projecting. 2024 was a banner year for Pinterest, capped off by a milestone Q4 achieving the company's first billion-dollar revenue quarter and a record 553 million monthly active users. Pinterest said it expects first-quarter sales to come in between $837 million and $852 million.
